calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Qui Yin Chen was present in pro per on behalf of herself, and as guardian ad litem for the minor, Jia Feng Jiang.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Allen Li was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Amy Quiyin Chen.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: David Jiafeng Jiang.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Qui Yin Chen was present in pro per to change her own name, as well as guardian ad litem for the minor, Jia Feng Jiang.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Allen Li was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with petitioner's request for change of name of the minor as there is no proof service in the case file indicating that the minor's father was given notice of today's hearing.

Good cause appearing, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR, and the Court instructed petitioner to seek assistance at the Access Center.
